arts.ttl: Luton Town fire: Championship side confirm Coventry game still on despite Kenilworth Road blaze
arts.sum: Luton Town Football Club expressed its gratitude to Bedfordshire Fire and Rescue Service, which sent four crews to the blaze at the stadium, Kenilworth Road, on Friday night

arts.ttl: Sheaf starts: Coventry City team news and predicted XI to face Luton Town
arts.sum: The latest Coventry City team news as Frank Lampard's side gear up to face Luton Town in the Championship. The post Sheaf starts: Coventry City team news and predicted XI to face Luton Town appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
